programmes.show_description: Shadow Dwellers: Siblings are chased by a menacing shadow figure, while mournful serenades haunt a family's new home and a dark entity attacks a young boy. (S1, ep 4)
UFO sightings are at an all time high. What makes these mass sightings incredible is also what makes them terrifying, and what might happen next? (S1, ep 5)
The Top Ten Pyramid Sites: Count down the world's top ten pyramid sites, from hidden structures in Peru to the famous landmarks of Giza in Egypt. (S15, ep 11)
Edge of Darkness: Tom receives a diagnosis for his heart condition. Elsewhere, Jake hunts coyotes and Mike climbs high into the mountains to hunt goats. (S11, ep 5)
Judas Snake: Troy and Pickle track a high-tech snake as Bill and Tes search for a new hot spot. Meanwhile, Dusty discovers one of his favourite honey holes has changed forever. (S3, ep 11)
Computer Crash: Seth is called upon to repair the malfunctioning computer system while Ashley is left to deal with an irate customer who was given the wrong ring. (S10, ep 7)
Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal or take a chance at auction instead? (S9, ep 35)

programmes.show_name: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programmes.show_description: Alien Encounters: A cow is mutilated, a man is repeatedly abducted from his bed, and an astronomer's telescope intercepts a mysterious message. (S2, ep 1)

programmes.show_name: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programmes.show_description: The End of the World: Decoding Mayan texts, a physicist predicts a cataclysm will destroy the world. A NASA scientist makes an alien discovery. (S2, ep 4)

programmes.show_name: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programmes.show_description: Parallel Worlds: While hiking a woman has a terrifying encounter with an entity from another world. (S2, ep 5)

programmes.show_name: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programmes.show_description: Freaks Of Nature: A small community is devastated by an earth-shattering 'boom,' while an paranormal fog seems to alter the very fabric of time. (S2, ep 6)
...Mysteries of the Universe. Are We Alone?: Discover unidentified objects witnessed by military pilots and a potential alien home in the darkness of space. (S1, ep 1)
...Mysteries of the Universe. Alien Earthlings: As we plan to travel to new worlds, how are we preparing to become human extraterrestrials? Will we survive into the unknown? (S1, ep 2)
...Mysteries of the Universe. Mysterious Earth: Earth remains a mystery to the billions of people on it. How did it come to exist? And how long will humans call it 'home'? (S1, ep 3)
...Mysteries of the Universe. Dangers From Space: From massive asteroids and bursts of radiation, are we prepared for the calamity that may be coming our way? (S1, ep 5)
Search for the Next Frontier: What will humans find when reaching other planets? And just how dangerous might it be? (S1, ep 6)
...Mysteries of the Universe. The Life and Death of the Sun: The sun's been worshipped since time began. Could unlocking its mysteries be the difference between life and death? (S1, ep 8)
Treasures of Monster Graveyard: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts discover a monster graveyard - a groundbreaking find containing treasures of alien beasts. (S6, ep 9)
Cold War spy satellite photographs of mysterious structures hidden in Poland's forest motivate local archaeologist Grzegorz Kiarszys to hunt them down. (S6, ep 10)
A shipwreck in Lake Michigan has an incredible history. How did this vessel, once part of Hitler's push to win World War II, end up stranded in one of the Great Lakes? (S6, ep 11)
The Deadly Bermuda Triangle: Explore some of the many theories that could help explain why so many ships, planes and people go missing in the Bermuda Triangle. (S4, ep 11)
The Hunt for Stolen Nazi Treasure: Delve into the top theories of where the Nazis hid their wealth, much of which was stolen during World War II. (S4, ep 12)
The Search for Noah's Ark: Explore the most notable theories into the possible whereabouts of Noah's Ark, based on ancient accounts. (S4, ep 13)

programmes.show_name: New: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid
programmes.show_description: Wrath of Gods: For millennia, plagues, curses, droughts and the violent destruction of cities have been blamed on the wrath of angry gods. (S2, ep 8)
Across centuries of human history, there have been many great kings, but Ivan IV does not hold this particular epithet. Experience his reign as the first tsar of Russia.
Bizarre Rituals: A look at the relevance of ancient practices like voodoo and exorcism today. Could there be more to such rituals than simply superstition? (S1, ep 5)
Life Beyond Death: William Shatner explores near-death experiences, reincarnation and how memories might be passed from organ donors to transplant recipients. (S1, ep 6)
Grand Canyon National Park: A strange series of events in Grand Canyon National Park leads researchers to speculate whether its power comes from forces that cannot be explained. (S1, ep 1)
Everglades National Park: A plane crash in the Everglades National Park leads to strange hauntings - and some believe the park may exert a dark, transformative power. (S1, ep 2)
Experts investigate evidence suggesting that aliens have created the means for controlling humanity. They find that the shocking truth might be hidden right inside you. (S1, ep 9)
Could Hitler's crazed quest for world domination have been influenced by aliens? Experts reveal the extraterrestrial secret Hitler may have been hiding and where it is now. (S1, ep 10)
Experts unseal the truth about the potential aliens living and working among us. Who has come in peace? And who has a more sinister motive in mind? (S1, ep 11)
Experts investigate the mystery of the Solway Firth Spaceman - a spacesuit-clad figure who strangely appeared in a photograph taken in Cumbria. (S1, ep 12)
Not On My Street: In San Diego, an enraged dog walker goes ballistic when she confronts a speeding driver in her neighbourhood. (S1, ep 7)
Attack of the Tacos: A man is pursued by an angry driver wielding a finger gun. A driver raging at two women in California is intercepted by two men who send him packing. (S1, ep 8)
Strike Out: Sibling rivalry is at an all-time high between Seth and Ashley, and when she scores two baseball deals that are clearly outside her comfort zone, Seth cries foul. (S9, ep 12)
The Return of the King: Follow the quirky day-to-day operations of American Jewelry and Loan, a family-owned and operated pawn shop in Detroit, Michigan. (S10, ep 1)
...Henry's Wreck-trospective. The Ardingly Wreck- Trospective: Dive headfirst into the archives to celebrate the very best bits from the hit series Junk & Disorderly. (S1, ep 7)
...Henry's Wreck-trospective. The Oakley Wreck-Trospective: Dive headfirst into the archives to celebrate the very best bits from the hit series Junk & Disorderly. (S1, ep 8)
The vintage restorers return for season four, challenging themselves to make money out of other people's automotive junk and classic collectables. (S4, ep 7)
VW Golf MK1: The guys buy a legendary Golf and instantly fall for it - but they get a nasty surprise when taking a closer look around the wheel well. (S3, ep 8)
I Came, I Saw, I Pawned: A seller strolls in with a collection of action figures signed by the cast of The Walking Dead, as Chum tries to catch an unusual Pokémon card. (S24, ep 4)
Big Apple Rick: Rick visits New York to see if he can complete a deal on a rare piece of tech. Meanwhile, a seller enters the shop with a special edition Stan Lee Funk Pop. (S24, ep 3)
New. Missouri Loves Company: On a visit to see Ton's sister in Missouri, the guys hit up a live auction and score a ballista and an anvil set made for an explosive sport. (S5, ep 10)
Tough As Nails: The guys head to a live auction to buy and sell. They uncover an unusual Marilyn Monroe statue, an industrial slip 'n' slide, and a bed of nails. (S5, ep 11)
Ton-Geons & Dragons: While Ton soups up their new truck, Allen heads to an auction and encounters Carolyn and CJ. There, he discovers LARP weaponry and a sword collection. (S5, ep 12)
Wreck-Shaw: Allen drags a starving Ton to a weekend auction and some newbie buyers try to eat up all the profit. Will the guys go home hungry? (S5, ep 13)
Carnies & Amories: A tough group of bidders team up to take down Ton and Allen at auction. After a couple of wins, the guys try to sell an arsenal used by Native Americans. (S5, ep 14)
The Unsinkable Ton: Unique finds lead the guys to some cool sales. They try to authenticate props from the film Titanic, and Ton faces off with a rattler. (S5, ep 15)
Buyers head to storage unit auctions across California. They are only allowed a brief of glimpse of what's inside before deciding how much they are prepared to bid. (S6, ep 3)
Buyers head to storage unit auctions across California. They are only allowed a brief of glimpse of what's inside before deciding how much they are prepared to bid. (S6, ep 4)
Return Of The King Of Montebello: Jarrod and Brandi split up for auctions in Montebello. Ivy hires someone to run his shop. Will his new employee be a help or a hindrance? (S6, ep 5)
For a Good Time, Call Ivy: Jarrod and Brandi are under pressure and fear that if they don't score a major profit, their new Long Beach store may have to close. (S6, ep 6)
LBC U LTR: Rene looks to use money to outmuscle his rival bidders, while Brandi and Jarrod deliver bad news to the staff of one of their stores. (S6, ep 7)
Masters Of Manipulation: Ivy makes a career-changing bid in the latest round of auctions. Meanwhile, gossip surrounds Jarrod and Brandi's Long Beach store. (S6, ep 8)
The Ranch Strikes Back: When Katie's sister returns for the first time in 50 years to the ranch where they both experienced terrifying events as children, the ranch reacts. (S3, ep 2)
The Drone Zone: When the gigantic, invisible Bubble raises new questions for the team, possible answers suddenly fall from the sky. (S6, ep 2)
The Treasure Within: Jeff and his team's search for the wrecks of Mary, Joseph and Neptune takes them further into uncharted territory. (S1, ep 5)
Titanic: The Titanic sank with a terrible death toll in 1912, but World War I soon overshadowed the tragedy. Decades later, two men strive to rediscover the ship's memory. (S2, ep 1)
In Bond, Colorado, a river raft guide stops for lunch with his group and spots something unusual in the forest across the way. (S8, ep 13)
